---
title: "Your presentation title<br>second line here"
subtitle: "Optional subtitle"
author: "Your Name"
email: "you@example.com"
website: "https://yourwebsite.com"
phone: "+00 (0)0 0000 0000"
github: "https://github.com/yourusername"
linkedin: "https://linkedin.com/in/yourusername"
institution: "Your Institution"       # used as logo alt text
# institution-logo: "images/logo.png" # auto-injected from _brand.yml logo.small; override here if needed
institution-url: "https://yourinstitution.org"
img-attribution: "Photographer / source / licence"
img-attribution-url: "https://source-url.example.com"
format: quarto-revealjs-mozilla-revealjs
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: "images/cover.jpg"
  data-background-opacity: "0.5"
---

## Your first slide title 
{{< source "Author (Year)" url="https://doi.org/..." >}}

Content goes here. Use a blank line between paragraphs.

- First bullet point
- Second bullet point
- Third bullet point

## Two-line heading for longer titles<br>that need a second line
{{< source "Source without a URL" >}}

You can break any heading across two lines with `<br>` in the heading text.

## Full background image slide {background-image="images/cover.jpg" background-opacity="0.5"}

Content rendered over a background image.

Use `background-opacity` to control how visible the image is.
